kb_documents.name: Convin Sense Product Doc.pdf
kb_documents.content:
Product Overview: Convin Omnichannel
AI Agents
What is Convin’s Omnichannel AI Agent?
Convin Omnichannel AI Agents help B2C sales and marketing teams automate lead
generation and lead qualification across multiple customer touchpoints—without losing the
human touch.
Using Convin, you can configure AI agents that engage prospects on:
● 📞 Phone calls
● 💬 WhatsApp messaging
● 📱 WhatsApp calling
● ✉ SMS
● 🌐 Website voice widgets
The AI agent runs outbound and inbound campaigns, interacts with leads in real time, and
decides the next best action for each lead—moving them closer to your business goal (e.g.,
booking a demo, qualifying intent, or collecting information).
When needed, the AI seamlessly hands over qualified leads to human sales agents to
maximize conversion and ROI.
Who Is This For?
This product is designed for:
● Sales teams
○ Increase qualified conversations
○ Focus human reps only on high-intent leads
○ Reduce time wasted on cold or unresponsive prospects

● Marketing teams
○ Scale lead generation across channels
○ Improve lead quality before handoff to sales
○ Run personalized, multi-touch campaigns without manual effort
● Revenue & Growth teams
○ Improve funnel conversion
○ Lower cost per qualified lead
○ Increase campaign ROI with AI + human collaboration
Key Value for Sales & Marketing Teams
Scale Outreach Without Scaling Headcount
Run thousands of personalized conversations across calls, WhatsApp, SMS, and
web—24/7—without increasing your sales team size.
Higher Lead Quality
The AI qualifies leads in real time based on your goals and criteria, so sales reps only speak
to high-intent prospects.
Faster Speed to First Contact
Instant AI outreach ensures no lead goes cold while waiting for a human agent.
AI + Human = Better Conversions
Use AI for scale and consistency, and humans for complex objections and closing. The
handoff is automatic and context-aware.
Better ROI on Campaigns
Automated engagement + intelligent next-best-action logic improves conversion rates and
lowers cost per acquisition.
How It Works (High-Level Flow)

1. Configure AI Agents
Create and customize AI agents in the Convin dashboard for different use cases
(lead gen, qualification, follow-ups).
2. Create Campaigns (Inbound or Outbound)
Define campaign goals such as:
○ Qualify interest
○ Book meetings
○ Collect user information
○ Nurture cold leads
3. Link Agents to Campaigns
Assign specific AI agents to run each campaign.
4. Add Leads to Campaigns
Upload or sync leads into campaigns.
5. AI Executes Conversations
The AI engages leads across configured channels and decides the next best action
on every interaction.
6. Human-in-the-Loop Handoff
High-intent or complex leads are routed to human sales agents for follow-up or
closing.
Core Capabilities
Omnichannel AI Engagement
Run conversations across:
● Phone calls
● WhatsApp (messages + calls)
● SMS
● Website voice widgets
Ensure consistent messaging across all customer touchpoints.

Goal-Driven AI Conversations
Each agent operates with a defined goal, such as:
● Lead qualification
● Appointment booking
● Data collection
● Product interest discovery
The AI adapts every interaction to move the lead closer to that goal.
Knowledge Base & Runtime Tools
AI agents can:
● Use your knowledge base to answer product questions
● Access tools in real time to:
○ Check availability
○ Capture lead data
○ Trigger workflows
○ Update systems
Telephony & WhatsApp Integrations
To operate across channels, AI agents connect with:
● Telephony providers for phone calls
● WhatsApp Business API (WABA) for WhatsApp messaging and calling
This enables true omnichannel execution from a single platform.

Human-in-the-Loop Sales Handoff
Human agents can be onboarded to the Convin dashboard to:
● Receive AI-qualified leads
● View conversation context
● Continue conversations seamlessly
● Close high-intent opportunities
This ensures AI handles scale, while humans handle nuance and deal closure.
Example Use Cases
● 📞 Automated outbound calling to qualify inbound leads
● 💬 WhatsApp campaigns to re-engage cold leads
● 🌐 Website voice bot to capture intent and book meetings
● 🔁 AI-led follow-ups after form submissions
● 🤝 AI qualification + human closing for high-value deals
What’s Next?
● Set up your first AI agent
● Create your first omnichannel campaign
● Connect telephony and WhatsApp integrations
● Onboard human sales reps for AI handoffs

kb_links.title: Convin: An AI Agent Platform for Customer Conversations
kb_links.content:
AI Agent Platform for Customer Conversations
Automate phone calls, empower reps in real-time, and unlock insights from every interaction to increase revenue, reduce costs, and improve customer experience.
Conversation Intelligence Agent
Solve Real Business Challenges
Trusted by B2C Leaders Who Get It
Trusted. Rated. Celebrated.
Integrate Effortlessly with Your Tech Stack
Experience Uncompromised Data Security
Transform Customer Conversations with Convin’s AI Agent Platform

kb_faqs.question: What is Convin's Omnichannel AI Agent?
kb_faqs.answer: Convin's Omnichannel AI Agent helps B2C sales and marketing teams automate lead generation and lead qualification across multiple customer touchpoints without losing the human touch. It can engage prospects via phone calls, WhatsApp messaging, WhatsApp calling, SMS, and website voice widgets. The AI runs both inbound and outbound campaigns, interacts with leads in real time, and decides the next best action for each lead.

kb_faqs.question: What channels does Convin's AI Agent support?
kb_faqs.answer: Convin's AI Agent supports five channels: phone calls, WhatsApp messaging, WhatsApp calling, SMS, and website voice widgets. This enables true omnichannel execution from a single platform.

kb_faqs.question: Does Convin support both inbound and outbound campaigns?
kb_faqs.answer: Yes, Convin's AI Agent supports both inbound and outbound campaigns. You can define campaign goals such as qualifying interest, booking meetings, collecting user information, or nurturing cold leads.

kb_faqs.question: What is the high-level flow of how Convin works?
kb_faqs.answer: The high-level flow has six steps: (1) Configure AI Agents in the dashboard, (2) Create inbound or outbound campaigns with defined goals, (3) Link agents to campaigns, (4) Add leads to campaigns, (5) AI executes conversations across channels, and (6) High-intent or complex leads are handed off to human sales agents.

kb_faqs.question: What is the core purpose of Convin's platform?
kb_faqs.answer: Convin's core purpose is to automate phone calls, empower reps in real time, and unlock insights from every interaction to increase revenue, reduce costs, and improve customer experience. It is described as an AI Agent Platform for Customer Conversations.

kb_faqs.question: Who is Convin's Omnichannel AI Agent designed for?
kb_faqs.answer: It is designed for three main groups: sales teams, marketing teams, and revenue & growth teams. Each group benefits differently — sales teams get more qualified leads, marketing teams can scale campaigns without manual effort, and revenue teams improve funnel conversion and ROI.

kb_faqs.question: How does Convin help sales teams specifically?
kb_faqs.answer: Convin helps sales teams increase qualified conversations, focus human reps only on high-intent leads, and reduce time wasted on cold or unresponsive prospects. The AI handles initial outreach and qualification so reps only engage with serious buyers.

kb_faqs.question: How does Convin benefit marketing teams?
kb_faqs.answer: Marketing teams can scale lead generation across channels, improve lead quality before handoff to sales, and run personalized multi-touch campaigns without manual effort. This allows them to do more with fewer resources.

kb_faqs.question: How does Convin help revenue and growth teams?
kb_faqs.answer: Revenue and growth teams benefit from improved funnel conversion, lower cost per qualified lead, and increased campaign ROI through AI and human collaboration. The platform makes every stage of the funnel more efficient.

kb_faqs.question: Is Convin built for B2B or B2C companies?
kb_faqs.answer: Convin is specifically designed for B2C sales and marketing teams. The product documentation explicitly states it helps B2C leaders automate lead generation and qualification.

kb_faqs.question: How does Convin help scale outreach without increasing headcount?
kb_faqs.answer: Convin runs thousands of personalized conversations across calls, WhatsApp, SMS, and web — 24/7 — without requiring you to increase your sales team size. The AI handles the volume while humans focus on closing.

kb_faqs.question: How does Convin improve lead quality?
kb_faqs.answer: The AI qualifies leads in real time based on your defined goals and criteria, so sales reps only speak to high-intent prospects. This removes low-quality or unresponsive leads from the human rep's queue.

kb_faqs.question: What does 'faster speed to first contact' mean in Convin?
kb_faqs.answer: Convin ensures instant AI outreach so no lead goes cold while waiting for a human agent to become available. The AI contacts leads immediately after they enter the system, maintaining momentum in the sales funnel.

kb_faqs.question: How does Convin combine AI and human effort for better conversions?
kb_faqs.answer: Convin uses AI for scale and consistency during early-stage engagement, and routes complex objections and closing to human agents. The handoff is automatic and context-aware, ensuring a seamless transition.

kb_faqs.question: How does Convin improve ROI on campaigns?
kb_faqs.answer: Automated engagement combined with intelligent next-best-action logic improves conversion rates and lowers cost per acquisition. By ensuring every lead gets timely, relevant follow-up, fewer opportunities are lost.

kb_faqs.question: What is 'Goal-Driven AI Conversations' in Convin?
kb_faqs.answer: Each AI agent in Convin operates with a defined goal such as lead qualification, appointment booking, data collection, or product interest discovery. The AI adapts every interaction to move the lead closer to that specific goal.

kb_faqs.question: What goals can you set for a Convin AI agent?
kb_faqs.answer: You can set goals such as lead qualification, appointment booking, data collection, and product interest discovery. The AI will tailor its conversations to achieve whichever goal you define.

kb_faqs.question: What is the Knowledge Base feature in Convin AI agents?
kb_faqs.answer: AI agents can use your product knowledge base to answer questions from prospects during conversations. This allows the AI to respond accurately to product-related queries without human intervention.

kb_faqs.question: What runtime tools can Convin AI agents access during conversations?
kb_faqs.answer: During live conversations, AI agents can check availability, capture lead data, trigger workflows, and update systems in real time. These tools allow the AI to take meaningful actions beyond just talking.

kb_faqs.question: What is the Human-in-the-Loop Sales Handoff feature?
kb_faqs.answer: Human agents can be onboarded to the Convin dashboard to receive AI-qualified leads, view conversation context, continue conversations seamlessly, and close high-intent opportunities. This ensures AI handles scale while humans handle nuance and deal closure.

kb_faqs.question: How does the AI decide what to do next after each interaction?
kb_faqs.answer: The AI uses next-best-action logic to decide what step to take after each conversation, such as following up, escalating to a human, or moving the lead to the next campaign stage. This logic is goal-driven and adapts based on the lead's responses.

kb_faqs.question: Can Convin AI agents ensure consistent messaging across channels?
kb_faqs.answer: Yes, Convin is designed to ensure consistent messaging across all customer touchpoints including calls, WhatsApp, SMS, and web. This consistency helps maintain a unified brand experience throughout the lead journey.

kb_faqs.question: What telephony integrations does Convin support?
kb_faqs.answer: Convin connects with telephony providers to enable phone call functionality for its AI agents. The documentation does not name specific providers but confirms telephony integration is required for phone-based campaigns.

kb_faqs.question: What is required to use WhatsApp with Convin?
kb_faqs.answer: Convin integrates with the WhatsApp Business API (WABA) to support WhatsApp messaging and calling. This integration enables the AI to engage leads on WhatsApp from within the Convin platform.

kb_faqs.question: Does Convin integrate with other tools in a tech stack?
kb_faqs.answer: Yes, the Convin website mentions that it integrates effortlessly with your tech stack. However, the documentation does not specify which exact tools or CRMs are supported.

kb_faqs.question: What is a website voice widget in Convin?
kb_faqs.answer: A website voice widget is a voice-enabled element placed on your website that allows visitors to interact with the AI agent via voice. It can be used to capture intent and book meetings directly from the site.

kb_faqs.question: What are example use cases for Convin's AI agents?
kb_faqs.answer: Example use cases include automated outbound calling to qualify inbound leads, WhatsApp campaigns to re-engage cold leads, website voice bots to capture intent and book meetings, AI-led follow-ups after form submissions, and AI qualification combined with human closing for high-value deals.

kb_faqs.question: Can Convin be used to re-engage cold leads?
kb_faqs.answer: Yes, WhatsApp campaigns can be set up specifically to re-engage cold leads. The AI reaches out with personalized messages to revive interest from prospects who have gone quiet.

kb_faqs.question: Can Convin book meetings or appointments automatically?
kb_faqs.answer: Yes, appointment booking is one of the defined goals you can set for a Convin AI agent. The AI can check availability and schedule meetings during the conversation using its runtime tools.

kb_faqs.question: Can Convin handle follow-ups after form submissions?
kb_faqs.answer: Yes, AI-led follow-ups after form submissions is listed as a key use case. Once a lead submits a form, the AI can immediately reach out to qualify or engage that lead.

kb_faqs.question: How can Convin be used for high-value deals?
kb_faqs.answer: For high-value deals, Convin supports an AI qualification plus human closing model. The AI handles early qualification and context-gathering, then hands off to a human rep who has full conversation history for closing.

kb_faqs.question: How do you create a campaign in Convin?
kb_faqs.answer: You create a campaign by defining its goal (such as qualify interest, book meetings, collect information, or nurture cold leads), then linking an AI agent to it, and finally adding leads to the campaign. Campaigns can be inbound or outbound.

kb_faqs.question: How do you add leads to a Convin campaign?
kb_faqs.answer: According to the documentation, you can upload or sync leads into campaigns. The specific methods of uploading or syncing are not detailed further in the available documentation.

kb_faqs.question: Can you run multiple campaigns simultaneously in Convin?
kb_faqs.answer: The documentation implies yes, since you can configure different AI agents for different use cases and link them to separate campaigns. However, explicit confirmation of simultaneous multi-campaign limits is not provided.

kb_faqs.question: What types of campaign goals can you define in Convin?
kb_faqs.answer: You can define goals such as qualifying interest, booking meetings, collecting user information, and nurturing cold leads. The AI agent will drive each conversation toward the defined goal.

kb_faqs.question: How do you set up a Convin AI agent?
kb_faqs.answer: You create and customize AI agents in the Convin dashboard, defining their goals and configuring them for specific use cases like lead gen, qualification, or follow-ups. The documentation recommends starting by setting up your first AI agent, then creating campaigns and connecting integrations.

kb_faqs.question: Can different AI agents be configured for different use cases?
kb_faqs.answer: Yes, you can create and customize multiple AI agents for different use cases such as lead generation, qualification, and follow-ups. Each agent can have its own goal, knowledge base, and tool configuration.

kb_faqs.question: What is the first step recommended for getting started with Convin?
kb_faqs.answer: The documentation recommends starting with setting up your first AI agent, followed by creating your first omnichannel campaign, connecting telephony and WhatsApp integrations, and onboarding human sales reps for AI handoffs.

kb_faqs.question: How do human sales reps get onboarded to Convin?
kb_faqs.answer: Human agents are onboarded to the Convin dashboard where they can receive AI-qualified leads, view conversation context, continue conversations, and close opportunities. The documentation recommends this as one of the first setup steps.

kb_faqs.question: What can human agents see when they receive a handoff from the AI?
kb_faqs.answer: Human agents can view the full conversation context from the AI interaction when they receive a handoff. This allows them to pick up the conversation seamlessly without the lead having to repeat themselves.

kb_faqs.question: When does Convin route a lead to a human agent?
kb_faqs.answer: The AI routes leads to human agents when they are high-intent or when the conversation is too complex for the AI to handle alone. The handoff is automatic and context-aware.

kb_faqs.question: What does Convin say about data security?
kb_faqs.answer: The Convin website states it offers 'uncompromised data security' as part of its platform. However, specific security certifications or protocols are not detailed in the available documentation.

kb_faqs.question: Is Convin trusted by enterprise or large companies?
kb_faqs.answer: Yes, the Convin website states it is 'trusted by B2C leaders' and is described as 'trusted, rated, and celebrated.' Specific company names are not listed in the available documentation.

kb_faqs.question: What is Convin's Conversation Intelligence Agent?
kb_faqs.answer: Convin offers a Conversation Intelligence Agent as part of its platform, designed to unlock insights from every customer interaction. It is positioned as a tool to help increase revenue, reduce costs, and improve customer experience.

kb_faqs.question: How does Convin use conversation data to improve outcomes?
kb_faqs.answer: Convin unlocks insights from every interaction to help teams increase revenue, reduce costs, and improve customer experience. The platform analyzes conversations to surface actionable intelligence for sales and marketing teams.

kb_faqs.question: Who are the two contacts listed under the ABC company in Convin's client data?
kb_faqs.answer: The two contacts listed under ABC company are animesh@convin.ai and Aman@convin.ai. Both have an 'Active' status. 💬 Referenced in the convin_clients.csv WhatsApp chat data added on Apr 08, 2026.

kb_faqs.question: What is the status of the contacts added from ABC company?
kb_faqs.answer: Both contacts from ABC company — animesh@convin.ai and Aman@convin.ai — have an 'Active' status in the client list. 💬 Referenced in convin_clients.csv, added on Apr 08, 2026.

kb_faqs.question: When were the ABC company contacts added to Convin's client list?
kb_faqs.answer: Both contacts from ABC company were added on April 8, 2026. 💬 Referenced in convin_clients.csv data added on Apr 08, 2026.

kb_faqs.question: What tags or notes are associated with the ABC company contacts?
kb_faqs.answer: No tags or notes are associated with either of the ABC company contacts — both the Tags and Notes fields are empty in the client data. 💬 Referenced in convin_clients.csv added on Apr 08, 2026.

kb_faqs.question: How many contacts from ABC company are listed in Convin's client data?
kb_faqs.answer: There are two contacts listed from ABC company: animesh@convin.ai and Aman@convin.ai. 💬 Referenced in convin_clients.csv added on Apr 08, 2026.

kb_faqs.question: What email domains are used by the ABC company contacts in Convin?
kb_faqs.answer: Both contacts use the convin.ai email domain — animesh@convin.ai and Aman@convin.ai. 💬 Referenced in convin_clients.csv added on Apr 08, 2026.

kb_faqs.question: What is Convin described as on its website?
kb_faqs.answer: Convin is described as 'An AI Agent Platform for Customer Conversations' on its website. It focuses on automating phone calls, empowering reps in real time, and unlocking insights from every interaction.

kb_faqs.question: What are the three main outcomes Convin promises on its website?
kb_faqs.answer: Convin's website promises three main outcomes: increasing revenue, reducing costs, and improving customer experience. These are achieved through AI-powered automation and conversation intelligence.

kb_faqs.question: What is the difference between inbound and outbound campaigns in Convin?
kb_faqs.answer: Outbound campaigns involve the AI proactively reaching out to leads, while inbound campaigns handle leads who initiate contact. Both types can be created and managed within the Convin platform.

kb_faqs.question: Can Convin run 24/7 campaigns?
kb_faqs.answer: Yes, Convin can run personalized conversations across calls, WhatsApp, SMS, and web 24/7 without requiring human involvement at every step. This is one of the platform's key value propositions for scaling outreach.

kb_faqs.question: How does Convin handle lead qualification?
kb_faqs.answer: The AI qualifies leads in real time based on your defined goals and criteria during live conversations. Qualified leads are then routed to human reps while unqualified or cold leads can be nurtured through further automated campaigns.

kb_faqs.question: What happens to low-intent leads in Convin?
kb_faqs.answer: Low-intent or cold leads can be nurtured through automated follow-up campaigns rather than being sent directly to human agents. The AI continues to engage them until they show higher intent or are marked as unresponsive.

kb_faqs.question: How does Convin prevent leads from going cold?
kb_faqs.answer: Convin ensures instant AI outreach so no lead waits for a human agent to become available. Speed to first contact is identified as a key value proposition of the platform.

kb_faqs.question: Can Convin capture lead data during conversations?
kb_faqs.answer: Yes, AI agents can capture lead data in real time using their runtime tools during conversations. This data can be used to update systems and trigger workflows automatically.

kb_faqs.question: Can Convin trigger external workflows automatically?
kb_faqs.answer: Yes, AI agents have access to runtime tools that can trigger workflows during conversations. This allows Convin to connect with broader business processes and automation systems.

kb_faqs.question: Can Convin update external systems during a conversation?
kb_faqs.answer: Yes, one of the runtime tools available to Convin AI agents is the ability to update external systems in real time during a conversation. This keeps your CRM or other tools in sync automatically.

kb_faqs.question: How personalized are Convin's AI conversations?
kb_faqs.answer: Convin is designed to run thousands of personalized conversations at scale across multiple channels. The AI adapts each interaction based on the lead's responses and the defined campaign goal.

kb_faqs.question: Can Convin run multi-touch campaigns?
kb_faqs.answer: Yes, Convin supports personalized, multi-touch campaigns without requiring manual effort. Marketing teams can use this to engage leads across multiple interactions and channels over time.

kb_faqs.question: What are the recommended next steps after learning about Convin?
kb_faqs.answer: The documentation recommends four next steps: set up your first AI agent, create your first omnichannel campaign, connect telephony and WhatsApp integrations, and onboard human sales reps for AI handoffs.

kb_faqs.question: What integrations need to be set up before using Convin fully?
kb_faqs.answer: You need to connect telephony providers for phone calls and the WhatsApp Business API (WABA) for WhatsApp messaging and calling before Convin can operate across all channels.

kb_faqs.question: How does Convin lower cost per qualified lead?
kb_faqs.answer: By automating lead outreach and qualification with AI, Convin reduces the human effort needed for early-stage engagement, which directly lowers the cost per qualified lead. Only high-intent leads are passed to human reps, making each rep's time more valuable.

kb_faqs.question: Does Convin reduce the need to hire more sales reps?
kb_faqs.answer: Yes, Convin is explicitly positioned as a way to scale outreach without scaling headcount. You can run thousands of conversations 24/7 without increasing your sales team size.

kb_faqs.question: How does Convin balance AI automation with human interaction?
kb_faqs.answer: Convin uses AI for scale, consistency, and early-stage qualification, while human agents handle complex objections and deal closure. The transition is automatic and context-aware, ensuring a smooth experience for the lead.

kb_faqs.question: Is the handoff from AI to human seamless in Convin?
kb_faqs.answer: Yes, the handoff is described as automatic and context-aware. Human agents receive full conversation context so they can continue seamlessly without the lead having to repeat information.

kb_faqs.question: Can human agents view AI conversation history in Convin?
kb_faqs.answer: Yes, when human agents receive a handoff, they can view the full conversation context from the AI's prior interaction with the lead. This ensures continuity and informed follow-up.

kb_faqs.question: Is Convin a single platform for all channels?
kb_faqs.answer: Yes, Convin enables omnichannel execution from a single platform, covering phone calls, WhatsApp messaging, WhatsApp calling, SMS, and website voice widgets. You manage everything from the Convin dashboard.

kb_faqs.question: What is the Convin dashboard used for?
kb_faqs.answer: The Convin dashboard is used to configure AI agents, create and manage campaigns, add leads, onboard human agents, and monitor interactions. It serves as the central control hub for all Convin operations.

kb_faqs.question: Does Convin support real-time AI interaction?
kb_faqs.answer: Yes, Convin AI agents interact with leads in real time across all supported channels. The AI makes real-time decisions about the next best action during each conversation.

kb_faqs.question: How is Convin positioned compared to traditional sales teams?
kb_faqs.answer: Convin is positioned as a complement to traditional sales teams — the AI handles volume and consistency while humans handle complexity and closing. It is not positioned as a replacement for human reps but as a force multiplier.

kb_faqs.question: What makes Convin different from a simple chatbot or auto-dialer?
kb_faqs.answer: Unlike simple chatbots or auto-dialers, Convin uses goal-driven AI conversations, real-time decision-making, runtime tool access, and context-aware human handoffs across multiple channels. It is designed for intelligent, personalized engagement at scale.

kb_faqs.question: What fields are captured in Convin's client data file?
kb_faqs.answer: The client data file (convin_clients.csv) captures the following fields: Company, Contact, Email, Status, Tags, Notes, and Added (date). 💬 Referenced in convin_clients.csv added on Apr 08, 2026.

kb_faqs.question: What is the 'Status' field in Convin's client data?
kb_faqs.answer: The 'Status' field indicates whether a client contact is Active or inactive. Both contacts listed in the available data have an 'Active' status. 💬 Referenced in convin_clients.csv added on Apr 08, 2026.

kb_faqs.question: Is there a second version of the Convin client CSV file?
kb_faqs.answer: Yes, there are two client CSV files referenced: convin_clients.csv and convin_clients (1).csv. The second file (convin_clients (1).csv) contains the two ABC company contacts, while convin_clients.csv appears to be empty or without visible data entries.

kb_faqs.question: What company is associated with the contacts in Convin's client CSV?
kb_faqs.answer: Both contacts in the available client data are associated with the company 'ABC.' 💬 Referenced in convin_clients (1).csv added on Apr 08, 2026.

kb_faqs.question: Does Convin support SMS as a channel?
kb_faqs.answer: Yes, SMS is one of the five channels supported by Convin's AI agents alongside phone calls, WhatsApp messaging, WhatsApp calling, and website voice widgets. It can be used for outbound and inbound campaigns.

kb_faqs.question: Can Convin run SMS campaigns?
kb_faqs.answer: Yes, Convin can run campaigns over SMS. The AI agent can engage leads via SMS as part of a multi-channel or standalone campaign strategy.

kb_faqs.question: Does Convin support both WhatsApp messaging and WhatsApp calling?
kb_faqs.answer: Yes, Convin supports both WhatsApp messaging and WhatsApp calling as separate channels. Both are enabled through the WhatsApp Business API (WABA) integration.

kb_faqs.question: What is required to use WhatsApp calling in Convin?
kb_faqs.answer: WhatsApp calling in Convin requires integration with the WhatsApp Business API (WABA). Once connected, the AI agent can make and receive calls via WhatsApp as part of its campaigns.

kb_faqs.question: Can Convin re-engage cold leads via WhatsApp?
kb_faqs.answer: Yes, WhatsApp campaigns are specifically cited as a use case for re-engaging cold leads. The AI can send personalized messages to bring dormant leads back into the funnel.

kb_faqs.question: Can Convin make automated outbound phone calls?
kb_faqs.answer: Yes, automated outbound calling to qualify inbound leads is one of the primary use cases listed for Convin. The AI agent conducts the calls and qualifies the lead before any human involvement.

kb_faqs.question: Does Convin support inbound phone call handling?
kb_faqs.answer: Yes, Convin supports inbound campaigns, which would include handling inbound phone calls. The AI agent can engage callers, qualify them, and route them appropriately.

kb_faqs.question: What is the website voice widget used for in Convin?
kb_faqs.answer: The website voice widget is used to capture visitor intent and book meetings directly from your website. It allows website visitors to interact with the AI agent via voice without needing a phone call or WhatsApp.

kb_faqs.question: Where does the Convin website voice widget appear?
kb_faqs.answer: The website voice widget appears on your business website as a voice-enabled interactive element. It is one of the five channels supported by Convin's omnichannel AI agents.

kb_faqs.question: How does Convin improve funnel conversion rates?
kb_faqs.answer: Convin improves funnel conversion by ensuring instant first contact, intelligent lead qualification, personalized multi-touch follow-ups, and context-aware human handoffs at the right moment. This reduces drop-off at every stage of the funnel.

kb_faqs.question: At what stage of the funnel does Convin AI operate?
kb_faqs.answer: Convin AI primarily operates at the top and middle of the funnel — handling initial outreach, lead qualification, and nurturing. Human agents take over at the bottom of the funnel for closing.

kb_faqs.question: Can Convin campaigns be used for data collection?
kb_faqs.answer: Yes, data collection is one of the defined campaign goals in Convin. The AI agent can collect information from leads during conversations and capture it using runtime tools.

kb_faqs.question: Can Convin be used to discover product interest among leads?
kb_faqs.answer: Yes, product interest discovery is one of the goals you can set for a Convin AI agent. The AI will guide the conversation to uncover whether the lead is interested in your product or service.

kb_faqs.question: Can Convin campaigns be used to nurture cold leads?
kb_faqs.answer: Yes, nurturing cold leads is explicitly listed as a campaign goal option in Convin. The AI can run automated, personalized follow-up sequences to warm up unresponsive prospects.

kb_faqs.question: How does the AI agent use the knowledge base during a call?
kb_faqs.answer: During a conversation, the AI agent can reference your product knowledge base to answer prospect questions accurately. This allows the AI to handle product-related queries without needing a human to intervene.

kb_faqs.question: Can you customize the knowledge base for each AI agent in Convin?
kb_faqs.answer: The documentation states that AI agents can use 'your knowledge base' to answer product questions, implying it is customizable per business. However, per-agent customization specifics are not detailed in the available documentation.

kb_faqs.question: Can Convin handle thousands of conversations simultaneously?
kb_faqs.answer: Yes, Convin is designed to run thousands of personalized conversations across calls, WhatsApp, SMS, and web simultaneously, 24/7. This is one of its core scalability value propositions.

kb_faqs.question: Is Convin suitable for large-scale B2C lead generation?
kb_faqs.answer: Yes, Convin is explicitly built for B2C sales and marketing teams that need to scale lead generation across multiple channels. It is designed to handle large volumes of leads without increasing team size.

kb_faqs.question: How does Convin empower sales reps in real time?
kb_faqs.answer: The Convin website states it empowers reps in real time, likely through features like live conversation context, AI-assisted insights, and real-time lead routing. The Conversation Intelligence Agent also surfaces insights to support reps during interactions.

kb_faqs.question: How does Convin contribute to revenue growth?
kb_faqs.answer: Convin contributes to revenue growth by increasing qualified conversations, improving funnel conversion, reducing cost per acquisition, and enabling faster lead engagement. The combination of AI scale and human closing maximizes revenue outcomes.

kb_faqs.question: How does Convin reduce operational costs?
kb_faqs.answer: Convin reduces costs by automating high-volume, repetitive outreach and qualification tasks that would otherwise require large sales teams. This lowers cost per qualified lead and improves overall operational efficiency.

kb_faqs.question: How does Convin improve customer experience?
kb_faqs.answer: Convin improves customer experience by ensuring instant responses, consistent messaging across channels, and seamless transitions from AI to human agents. Leads never have to wait or repeat themselves, creating a smoother interaction.

kb_faqs.question: What is the 'next best action' logic in Convin?
kb_faqs.answer: The next best action logic is the AI's ability to decide what step to take after each lead interaction — such as sending a follow-up message, escalating to a human, or moving the lead to a different campaign stage. It is goal-driven and adapts based on the lead's behavior and responses.

kb_faqs.question: Is the next best action in Convin automated or manual?
kb_faqs.answer: The next best action is automated — the AI decides and executes it without requiring manual input from a human agent. This is what allows Convin to operate efficiently at scale across thousands of leads.

kb_faqs.question: Can Convin check availability during a conversation?
kb_faqs.answer: Yes, one of the runtime tools available to Convin AI agents is the ability to check availability in real time. This is used, for example, when booking appointments so the AI can offer valid time slots to the lead.

kb_faqs.question: How is Convin described in terms of industry recognition?
kb_faqs.answer: Convin's website describes the platform as 'Trusted. Rated. Celebrated.' and states it is 'trusted by B2C leaders.' Specific awards or ratings are not detailed in the available documentation.

kb_faqs.question: Why is an omnichannel approach important in Convin's strategy?
kb_faqs.answer: An omnichannel approach ensures consistent messaging and engagement across all customer touchpoints, reducing the chance of leads falling through the cracks. Convin's ability to operate across calls, WhatsApp, SMS, and web means leads can be reached on their preferred channel.

kb_faqs.question: What does 'consistent messaging across all touchpoints' mean in Convin?
kb_faqs.answer: It means the AI delivers a unified, coherent brand and campaign message regardless of which channel — call, WhatsApp, SMS, or web — the lead is engaging through. This prevents mixed signals and improves the lead experience.

kb_faqs.question: What are the 'What's Next' steps mentioned in Convin's documentation?
kb_faqs.answer: The documentation lists four 'What's Next' steps: set up your first AI agent, create your first omnichannel campaign, connect telephony and WhatsApp integrations, and onboard human sales reps for AI handoffs. These serve as the recommended onboarding path.

kb_faqs.question: What data is stored in the Convin client CSV files shared via WhatsApp?
kb_faqs.answer: The CSV files store client information including Company name, Contact name, Email address, Status, Tags, Notes, and the date the contact was added. 💬 Referenced in convin_clients (1).csv added on Apr 08, 2026.

kb_faqs.question: Can you configure AI agents for different use cases in Convin?
kb_faqs.answer: Yes, you can create and customize multiple AI agents for different use cases such as lead generation, qualification, follow-ups, appointment booking, and data collection. Each agent is configured independently in the Convin dashboard.

kb_faqs.question: What does 'customizing an AI agent' involve in Convin?
kb_faqs.answer: Customizing an AI agent involves defining its goal, connecting it to a knowledge base, configuring runtime tools, and assigning it to specific campaigns. The exact customization interface details are not fully specified in the available documentation.

kb_faqs.question: Who executes the conversations in a Convin campaign?
kb_faqs.answer: The AI agent executes the conversations automatically across all configured channels once the campaign is live and leads are added. Human agents only get involved when the AI routes a qualified or complex lead to them.

kb_faqs.question: Can Convin campaigns run without any human involvement?
kb_faqs.answer: Yes, campaigns can run fully automated with the AI handling all interactions. Human agents are only involved during the handoff stage for high-intent or complex leads, not during the initial AI-driven engagement.

kb_faqs.question: How are leads routed to human agents in Convin?
kb_faqs.answer: The AI automatically routes high-intent or complex leads to human agents based on the conversation outcome and next-best-action logic. The routing is context-aware and includes the full conversation history for the human agent.

kb_faqs.question: Can Convin route leads to specific human agents?
kb_faqs.answer: The documentation states human agents can be onboarded to the Convin dashboard to receive AI-qualified leads, but specific routing rules or assignment logic for individual reps are not detailed in the available documentation.

kb_faqs.question: How does Convin differentiate itself from traditional lead generation tools?
kb_faqs.answer: Convin differentiates itself through real-time AI conversations (not just forms or static chatbots), omnichannel engagement, goal-driven AI logic, runtime tool access, and seamless AI-to-human handoffs. It combines scale with intelligence and human oversight.

kb_faqs.question: What business goal does Convin ultimately help achieve?
kb_faqs.answer: Convin helps businesses move leads closer to conversion goals such as booking a demo, qualifying intent, or collecting information. The ultimate goal is to increase revenue, reduce costs, and improve customer experience through smarter, faster, and more scalable lead engagement.
